docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 77859115) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROGERS, JAI $3,349.25 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,624.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76898994) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
